tasks.title: Top up OpenAI account ($5)
tasks.description: Memory search is broken — embedding quota exhausted. Add $5 credit at platform.openai.com/settings/organization/billing. This restores semantic memory search across all sessions.

tasks.title: Update Meta/Instagram ad landing page URL
tasks.description: Instagram campaign (€50/day) is sending ALL traffic to the OLD page /revision-for-leaving-cert-2026/ instead of the optimised /revision-for-leaving-cert-2026-parents-b/. Log into Meta Business Suite and update the ad URL. This is costing real money every day.

tasks.title: Get Anthropic Usage/Billing API access
tasks.description: So Mission Control can show REAL costs from the Anthropic bill, not just OpenClaw estimates. Check console.anthropic.com for an admin/billing API key or usage API endpoint.

tasks.title: Get OpenAI Usage API access
tasks.description: Same as Anthropic — lets Mission Control show real OpenAI spend. Check platform.openai.com/usage for API access.

tasks.title: Add 2nd Anthropic account as fallback
tasks.description: Run: openclaw auth add anthropic:backup --provider anthropic --mode api_key — then paste the API key from your 2nd Claude account. I'll configure it as a fallback model.

tasks.title: Make phone number clickable (tel: link) on revision pages
tasks.description: 085 846 6670 appears as plain text on all revision landing pages. Needs to be a clickable tel: link so mobile users can tap to call. Edit in WordPress: wrap with <a href='tel:+353858466670'>. Pages: /revision-for-leaving-cert-2026/, /-parents-b/, /expert-revision-course/

tasks.title: Fix /nogo/ page — add CTA button
tasks.description: The /nogo/ paywall page gets 275 sessions/month and is a dead end — says 'please purchase' but has no link to the course. Add a CTA button linking to the relevant course, or redirect to the course page with a 'Get access' prompt.

tasks.title: Upgrade Meta Business Suite permissions
tasks.description: leamyclaw@gmail.com has Partial access. Needs Full access or Content toggle enabled so I can create and post Instagram content directly instead of sending it to you to paste manually.

tasks.title: Film 30-second revision course video for Instagram
tasks.description: Short face-to-camera video advertising the revision courses. Would massively boost Instagram engagement vs static images. Can be shot on phone — just you talking about the courses for 30 seconds.

tasks.title: Remove outdated dates from course names
tasks.description: Course names like 'Financial Maths May 17th 2020' make the site look abandoned. Either remove dates or update to 2026. Also 'Re-opening for September 2023' on classroom grinds page.

tasks.title: Fix duplicate cart item bug
tasks.description: Adding the free product to cart results in quantity ×2 at checkout. Likely a WooCommerce cart session issue. May need developer investigation.

tasks.title: Get access to GTM containers
tasks.description: Two GTM containers (GTM-KQRRRZRD + GTM-MZQ9J4J) on the site are not accessible under leamyclaw@gmail.com. Need access to manage conversion tracking tags properly.
